name: pm-tactical
description: Five tested skills that make a PM's daily Claude workflow cheaper, faster, and self-checking: model-complexity-router (right model per task + subagent delegation), builder-validator (frozen-spec self-QA), prompt-optimizer-loop (one-mutation-per-round prompt tuning), cli-over-mcp-auditor (reclaim context eaten by idle MCPs), pm-context-system (compounding project memory).
